revision.text: <noinclude> {| |</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="<nowiki>{{{sort|</nowiki>{{{sort}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>"}} style="background: {{{bg|<nowiki>{{/bgcolor}}</nowiki>}}}; color: {{{color|black}}}; vertical-align: {{{valign|middle}}}; text-align: <nowiki>{{{align|</nowiki>{{{align|center}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>; <nowiki>{{{style|text-transform: capitalize;}}}</nowiki>" class="{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}} table-{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}"| <nowiki>{{{1|</nowiki>{{{text}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki><noinclude> |} {{Documentation}} <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE --> [[Category:Table cell templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Table cell templates
revision.text:
<noinclude> {| |</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="<nowiki>{{{sort|</nowiki>{{{sort}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>"}} style="background: {{{bg|<nowiki>{{/bgcolor}}</nowiki>}}}; color: {{{color|black}}}; vertical-align: {{{valign|middle}}}; text-align: <nowiki>{{{align|</nowiki>{{{align|center}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>; <nowiki>{{{style|text-transform: capitalize;}}}</nowiki>" class="{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}} table-{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}"| <nowiki>{{{1|</nowiki>{{{text}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki><noinclude> |} {{Documentation}} <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude> {| |</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="<nowiki>{{{sort|</nowiki>{{{sort}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>"}} style="background: {{{bg|<nowiki>{{/bgcolor}}</nowiki>}}}; color: {{{color|black}}}; vertical-align: {{{valign|middle}}}; text-align: <nowiki>{{{align|</nowiki>{{{align|center}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>; <nowiki>{{{style|text-transform: capitalize;}}}</nowiki>" class="{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}} table-{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}"| <nowiki>{{{1|</nowiki>{{{text}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki><noinclude> |} {{Documentation}} <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE -->
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude> {| |</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="<nowiki>{{{sort|</nowiki>{{{sort}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>"}} style="background: {{{bg|<nowiki>{{/bgcolor}}</nowiki>}}}; color: {{{color|black}}}; vertical-align: {{{valign|middle}}}; text-align: <nowiki>{{{align|</nowiki>{{{align|center}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>; <nowiki>{{{style|text-transform: capitalize;}}}</nowiki>" class="{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}} table-{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}"| <nowiki>{{{1|</nowiki>{{{text}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki><noinclude> |} {{Documentation}} <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude> {| |</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="<nowiki>{{{sort|</nowiki>{{{sort}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>"}} style="background: {{{bg|<nowiki>{{/bgcolor}}</nowiki>}}}; color: {{{color|black}}}; vertical-align: {{{valign|middle}}}; text-align: <nowiki>{{{align|</nowiki>{{{align|center}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>; <nowiki>{{{style|text-transform: capitalize;}}}</nowiki>" class="{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}} table-{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}"| <nowiki>{{{1|</nowiki>{{{text}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki><noinclude> |} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE -->
</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude> {| |</noinclude>{{#if:{{{sort|}}}|data-sort-value="<nowiki>{{{sort|</nowiki>{{{sort}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>"}} style="background: {{{bg|<nowiki>{{/bgcolor}}</nowiki>}}}; color: {{{color|black}}}; vertical-align: {{{valign|middle}}}; text-align: <nowiki>{{{align|</nowiki>{{{align|center}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki>; <nowiki>{{{style|text-transform: capitalize;}}}</nowiki>" class="{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}} table-{{{class|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}"| <nowiki>{{{1|</nowiki>{{{text}}}<nowiki>}}}</nowiki><noinclude> |} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE -->
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
